description: Prevent writing to .env and credential files

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r .tool_input.file_path); if echo "$path" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\."; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Blocked: cannot write to .env files\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r .tool_input.file_path); if echo "$path" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\."; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"Blocked: cannot edit .env files\"}"; fi'
